original_image_tags: grayscale infrared (IR) or Forward-Looking Infrared (FLIR) sensor still. A central crosshair reticle is visible with horizontal and vertical lines. The number "3" is marked at the left and right ends of the horizontal reticle line. Near the center of the crosshair, a small, dark, elongated object (likely black-hot BHOT polarity) is visible against a lighter, grainy background. The object appears as a solid, slightly oval-shaped dark spot with a smaller, fainter dark mark immediately to its right.

elements.description: Grayscale infrared or thermal image featuring a central white crosshair reticle. A single, small, dark, irregular object is positioned just above the horizontal line and slightly to the right of the vertical line. The image is heavily redacted, with six black rectangular bars obscuring areas on the left and right sides. The number '3' is visible on the left and right ends of the horizontal reticle line. A timestamp in the lower-left corner reads '12/31/99 18:20:41'.

judge.reason: Description B claims a timestamp '12/31/99 18:20:41' and six black redaction bars that are completely absent from Description A, and the object's position relative to the crosshair differs.
